revision_rationale.d_mm: Dr. Fluidics REVISE: r_mix=1.172 > 0.20. d_fix = 0.75×√(0.15/1.172) = 0.75×0.358 = 0.268 → rounded down to 0.5 mm.
revision_rationale.concentration_M: Dr. Chemistry REVISE: mixing-limited reaction, reducing concentration from 0.5 M to 0.125 M (midpoint of typical 0.05-0.20 M range) to improve mixing performance.
